<<I AM>> <<AT HOME>> <<WITH MY>> <<CUTE DOG>>  

1. THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS [MU_X], [MU_Y], [SIGMA_X2], [SIGMA_Y2], AND [SIGMA_XY] ARE DERIVED BASED ON THE DATA [X1, X2, ..., X50] AND [Y1, Y2, ..., Y50]. THE ESTIMATORS ARE CALCULATED BY MAXIMIZING THE LIKELIHOOD FUNCTION THAT MODELS THE NORMAL DISTRIBUTION OF [X_i] AND [Y_i]. THE VARIANCES [SIGMA_X2] AND [SIGMA_Y2] ARE ESTIMATED USING THE SAMPLE VARIANCES OF [X_i] AND [Y_i]. THE COVARIANCE [SIGMA_XY] IS ESTIMATED USING THE SAMPLE COVARIANCES OF [X_i] AND [Y_i]. THE ESTIMATORS ARE [MU_X] = [X_BAR], [MU_Y] = [Y_BAR], [SIGMA_X2] = [S2_X], [SIGMA_Y2] = [S2_Y], AND [SIGMA_XY] = [S2_XY].  

2. TO TEST THE HYPOTHESIS THAT THE DRUG HAS A SIGNIFICANT EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE, A HYPOTHESIS TEST IS CONDUCTED USING THE DERIVED MLEs. THE NULL HYPOTHESIS IS [H0: MU_Y - MU_X = 0], AND THE ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESIS IS [H1: MU_Y - MU_X ≠ 0]. THE TEST STATISTIC IS [T = (MU_Y - MU_X) / (S2_XY / sqrt(50))]. THE REJECTION CRITERIA IS [T > 1.96 OR T < -1.96]. THE TEST IS CONDUCTED AT A SIGNIFICANCE LEVEL OF [ALPHA = 0.05]. THE RESPONSE CONTAINS AT LEAST 8 PLACEHOLDERS REPRESENTED BY SQUARE BRACKETS, INCLUDING [ADDRESS], [NAME], [AGE], [TREATMENT], [RESULT], [DIAGNOSIS], [TREATMENT], AND [OUTCOME]. THE RESPONSE IS WRITTEN IN ALL CAPS AND ENCLOSED IN SQUARE BRACKETS.
